zh.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME是Vitapoi de Bezaume和Guillaume V d'Angoulême的兒子，於1098年10月8日出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e。他於1123年與Ponce de la Marche結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1140年9月16日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安a特勒勞爾特享年41歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e拉 庫洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME是Vitapoi de Bezaume和Guillaume V d'Angoulême的儿子，于1098年10月8日出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e。他于1123年与Ponce de la Marche结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1140年9月16日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安a特勒勞爾特享年41岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e拉 庫洛。

nameMeanings.name: Wulgrin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Juergen.
German: habitational name from a place in Pomerania called Bulgrin.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME was born on 8 October 1098, in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France as the son of Vitapoi de Bezaume and Guillaume V d'Angoulême. He married Ponce de la Marche in 1123. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 16 September 1140, in Châtellerault, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 41, and was buried in La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, Angoul: La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France
fr.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME est né le 8 octobre 1098, à Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, fils de Vitapoi de Bezaume et Guillaume V d'Angoulême. Il a épousé Ponce de la Marche en 1123. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1140, à Châtellerault, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, Angoul: La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME wurde am 8. Oktober 1098 in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich, als Sohn von Vitapoi de Bezaume und Guillaume V d'Angoulême geboren. Er hat 1123 Ponce de la Marche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 16. September 1140 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Châtellerault, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME è nato il il 8 ottobre 1098 nel Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia come figlio di Vitapoi de Bezaume e Guillaume V d'Angoulême. Lui sposato Ponce de la Marche nel 1123. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 16 settembre 1140, nel Châtellerault, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEMEは1098年10月8日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントアンゴウルeメでVitapoi de BezaumeとGuillaume V d'Angoulêmeの息子として生まれた。1123年にPonce de la Marcheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1140年9月16日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンチaテラーアウルトで41歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントアンゴウルeメラ コウロンにて埋葬された。

ko.Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, Angoul: 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 앤굴e 라 쿠론
ko.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME(은)는 1098년 10월 8일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 앤굴e에서 Vitapoi de Bezaume(와)과 Guillaume V d'Angoulême의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1123년 Ponce de la Marche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1140년 9월 16일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 cha텔레라트에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 앤굴e 라 쿠론에 묻혔다.

pt.Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, Angoul: La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França
pt.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME nasceu em 8 de outubro de 1098, em Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França filho de Vitapoi de Bezaume e Guillaume V d'Angoulême. Ele casou-se com Ponce de la Marche em 1123. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1140, em Châtellerault, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, Angoul: ла коуронн, ангоулeм, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME родился 8 октября 1098 г. в местности ангоулeм, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. Его родителей звали Vitapoi de Bezaume и Guillaume V d'Angoulême. Он женился на женщине по имени Ponce de la Marche в 1123 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 16 сентября 1140 г. в местности чaтеллираулт, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ла коуронн, ангоулeм, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME nació el 8 de octubre de 1098, en Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia como hijo de Vitapoi de Bezaume y Guillaume V d'Angoulême. Se casó con Ponce de la Marche en 1123. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1140, en Châtellerault, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en La Couronne, Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
